_doc: Component weights for the topic-scoring model. Each value is a float; loaded by scoring.load_weights(). The runtime normalizes the sum to 1.0 if it drifts, so partial tuning is safe. Do not add or remove keys without updating scoring.ScoreComponents.
_corporate_deal_doc: NON-component tuning (2026-06-11, CODE_AUDIT item (d)): damp the ai_vendor + named_human bonuses and apply a flat penalty when a candidate carries FINANCIAL corporate-deal language (IPO / S-1 / funding round / raises $ / valuation / acquisition / merger / SPAC / series A-F / investors). These two keys sit OUTSIDE the 8 normalized component weights (load_weights ignores them), so the PU-10 governance HOLD on the component numbers and the sum-to-1.0 normalization are both untouched. Loaded by scoring.load_corporate_deal_tuning(). Set bonus_damp=1.0 and penalty=0.0 to disable.
